code:
sequenceDiagram
actor Dev
participant GitHub
participant Runner
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Docker Build and Push"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Docker Build and Push
Runner->>Runner: job build-and-push
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Set up Docker Buildx
Runner-->>Runner: Log in to Container Registry
Runner-->>Runner: Extract metadata
Runner-->>Runner: Build and push Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Test Docker image
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Codebase Mindmap"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Codebase Mindmap
Runner->>Runner: job build
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout
Runner-->>Runner: Setup Node.js
Runner-->>Runner: Install markmap-cli
Runner-->>Runner: Generate Markdown map
Runner-->>Runner: Build Markmap HTML
Runner-->>Runner: Upload artifact (Retail_OrderManagement)
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Pages artifact
Runner->>Runner: job deploy
Runner-->>Runner: Deploy to GitHub Pages
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "PR Validation"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop PR Validation
Runner->>Runner: job validate-pr
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Install PyYAML
Runner-->>Runner: Validate YAML files
Runner-->>Runner: Validate Shell Scripts
end
Dev->>GitHub: triggers "Security Scanning"
GitHub->>Runner: dispatch
loop Security Scanning
Runner->>Runner: job trivy-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner in repo mode
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Trivy results to GitHub Security
Runner->>Runner: job docker-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: Build Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Run Trivy on Docker image
Runner-->>Runner: Upload Docker scan results
Runner->>Runner: job secret-scan
Runner-->>Runner: Checkout code
Runner-->>Runner: TruffleHog OSS
end
repo_description: AegisNet: An advanced, integrated defense solution leveraging AI, autonomous drones, and advanced detection systems for comprehensive situational awareness and security.

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要梳理一下CI/CD流水线的整体架构。目前团队有四个核心工作流：Docker镜像构建、代码库可视化、PR校验和安全扫描。我想用序列图来展示Dev、GitHub和Runner之间的交互。
明白了。我注意到安全扫描部分比较复杂，包含三个并行任务：Trivy仓库扫描、Docker镜像扫描和密钥泄露扫描。您希望把这三个job都展开，还是合并示意？另外，Docker Build and Push里的Test Docker image步骤是不是在push之后执行？
安全扫描的三个job都要展开，这是合规要求。Test Docker image确实是在Build and push之后，属于同一个loop里的最后一步。还有Codebase Mindmap那个工作流，它其实包含build和deploy两个job，deploy是独立部署到GitHub Pages的。
好的，我先画出主干结构。Dev作为actor触发四个工作流，GitHub负责dispatch到Runner。每个loop内部我标注具体的job名称和步骤。Codebase Mindmap的build job里包含Setup Node.js和Install markmap-cli，然后是Generate Markdown map和Build Markmap HTML，最后有两个Upload步骤。
Upload artifact那个步骤需要注明是Retail_OrderManagement项目，Upload Pages artifact保持通用名称就行。另外PR Validation工作流里，除了Validate YAML files，还要加上Validate Shell Scripts，我们最近发现很多shell脚本规范问题。

已调整。现在看Security Scanning部分：trivy-scan job包含Run Trivy vulnerability scanner in repo mode和Upload Trivy results to GitHub Security；docker-scan job需要Checkout、Build Docker image、Run Trivy on Docker image、Upload Docker scan results；secret-scan用TruffleHog OSS。这样层级对吗？
elements_involved: Run Trivy vulnerability scanner in repo mode
Upload Trivy results to GitHub Security

cscw_dialogue.utterance: docker-scan的描述需要精确一点，不是"Build Docker image"，应该是"Build Docker image"作为独立步骤，但Trivy扫描的是这个镜像。另外secret-scan的TruffleHog OSS前面最好加上"Run"，和其他步骤保持语法一致。还有Docker Build and Push loop里，Set up Docker Buildx和Log in to Container Registry的顺序不能错。
已修正所有细节。最终结构：四个trigger并行，每个loop内部步骤完整，Security Scanning的三个job清晰分离，Codebase Mindmap的build和deploy正确关联，所有artifact上传和部署动作都对应到具体目标。需要再检查Extract metadata在Docker Build and Push中的位置吗？
Extract metadata放在Log in之后、Build and push之前，这个顺序是对的。整体结构没问题了，可以定稿。
